sources.name: TOHM – The Open Healthcare Process Mapping Project
sources.description: Collaborative project mapping healthcare processes using BPMN notation. Pharmacy and Medication Circuit available in Level 1 and Level 2 detail.

sources.name: Drugs Circuit in the Hospital Pharmacy: Reorganization and Model Proposal
sources.journal: Journal of Supply Chain and Customer Relationship Management
sources.description: BPM-based analysis and optimization proposal for hospital pharmacy drug circuit, covering procurement, storage, distribution. Includes SWOT analysis and value chain mapping.

sources.name: Hospital Medication Workflow – IHE Wiki
sources.description: IHE (Integrating the Healthcare Enterprise) profile for hospital medication workflow integration.

sources.name: IHE Pharmacy Supply – Use Case 1: Medication Order and Distribution
sources.description: FHIR-based implementation guide for pharmacy supply chain use cases, including medication ordering and floor stock distribution.
